title: Rolson 66765 Bike Accessory Pack
features: COMPLETE KIT all you need to get started with cycling – either for a new bike or an upgrade this handy jut has one of each of the major areas you need

SECURITY – strong 12mm steel cable lock with 2 keys – comes with rust-proof protective sheath for weather resistance and added strength and security. This can also be fitted to your bike using its storage bracket ready for the lock to protect and make it secure
LED LIGHTS – basic be seen light set of front and rear LED Lights- no need for changing bulbs these should last over 10000 hours of use. Both come with mounting brackets,
BATTERIES INCLUDED – as always this item is ready to go straight out of the pack – 4 AA alkaline strength batteries.
description: This kit contains all the accessories you need to get your bike safely on the road. It contains – lights,lock and a pump. All come with brackets that fit to the bike frame so they can be stored while not being used. The light uses AA batteries which are supplied. The mini pump is ideal for partial inflation of tyres and the lock is a keyed lock so you can leave a spare at home or in the office. All in all it would make an ideal gift or add on for any new bike owner.
